case_title: BRIAN WONG VS. FRANK LOPEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, BRIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, FRANK RAMIREZ, CARLOS $9,075.87 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,150.87, COST OF THE CLAIM IS JOINT AND SEVERAL BETWEEN THE DEFENDANTS. SPECIFICALLY, DEFENDNAT CARLOS RAMIRES OWES PLAINTIFF $4,387.15 PLUS COSTS $37.50 TOTALING $4,424.65. DEFENDANT FRANK LOPEZ OWES PLANTIFF 44,688.72 PLUS COSTS $37.50 TOTALING $4,726.22. *SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT* STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 5/5/22. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO CARLOS RAMIREZ- ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED MAR-07-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, FRANK
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED MAR-07-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, CARLOS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2022 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON APRIL 12, 2022)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,900.00 FILED BY WONG, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, FRANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
